title: Muiltiple Calendar date for the same project/job
excerpt: We are using calendar view to track progress of our current project/jobs. My question is, can we retain previous calendar dates when we change the status of the project/job? As of right now, when we change the status and…

posts.author: Willie (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using calendar view to track progress of our current project/jobs. My question is, can we retain previous calendar dates when we change the status of the project/job? As of right now, when we change the status and/or date of a project, we lose the previous calendar date.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bill,

Is it possible for you to share a screen-recording of this behaviour in action? Similarly, do you happen to have an automation set up that’s adjusting the dare based on that status change? Any additional insight or context would be super helpful so we can better understand what might be happening here?

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Not possible on monday. Even if it it would be need 2 date column. In one the previous date will be saved in new col new date. If you use make then it would be possible. Let me know if you need help with make. Thanks
